name: Mikanko Spiritwalk
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>御巫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みかんこ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>かみかくし
desc: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; equip that face-up monster to 1 "Mikanko" monster you control as an Equip Spell, then if a Ritual Monster Card is on the field, you can inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each Equip Spell you control. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 of your "Mikanko" monsters that is banished or in your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mikanko Spiritwalk" once per turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; equip that face-up monster to 1 "Mikanko" monster you control as an Equip Spell, then if a Ritual Monster Card is on the field, you can inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each Equip Spell you control. You can banish this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 of your "Mikanko" monsters that is banished or in your hand. You can only use each effect of "Mikanko Spiritwalk" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the opponent's field
summoning: Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
